hero.headline: Verlin Labs - AI knowledge that does not expire
hero.subheadline: A new AI tool shows up almost every month, and suddenly you are back to square one. We fix that by teaching the thinking behind the tools, not just which buttons to press - so the next one feels familiar in minutes, not weeks. Free 2-hour live session, no pitch, no card. Built for school students, engineers, and product managers.

howItWorks.title: Discover
howItWorks.description: Start with a free 2-hour session and see if the teaching style actually clicks for you.

howItWorks.title: Understand
howItWorks.description: Dig into the mental models that make AI systems less of a black box.

howItWorks.title: Build
howItWorks.description: Work on real projects from early on - not after weeks of theory.

howItWorks.title: Showcase
howItWorks.description: Present what you built on Demo Day.

mentalModels.alt: Mental models, not tool lists - a dozen scattered tools converging into one reusable Information, Framework, Clarity core

homeFaqs.question: Is the free session really free?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes - completely free with no hidden fees. We want you to experience our teaching style before considering the full course. No credit card is required to book.

homeFaqs.question: What is a mental model?
homeFaqs.answer: It is a simple framework for how something actually works, not a list of facts to memorize. Once you have the structure behind AI systems in your head, new tools and buzzwords stop feeling like a fresh crisis every time.

homeFaqs.question: Do I need any prior AI knowledge?
homeFaqs.answer: No. We start from clarity-first foundations and adapt depth to your track - students, engineers, or product managers. Bring curiosity; we handle the structure.

homeFaqs.question: How is this different from YouTube or courses?
homeFaqs.answer: Honestly, there is a ton of good free stuff on YouTube. The difference here is we slow down for the mental models, answer your messy questions live, and match examples to where you actually are - whether that is Class 8 or leading product at a startup.

homeFaqs.question: Can I join if I am a complete beginner?
homeFaqs.answer: Absolutely. The student track and free session are designed for first exposure to AI. We use plain language, visual frameworks, and no jargon until the idea itself is clear.

homeFaqs.question: What happens after the free session?
homeFaqs.answer: You will receive a summary, resource starter pack, and optional next steps. If the full program fits your goals, we will share enrollment details - no pressure and no hard sell.

homeFaqs.question: Who is this for?
homeFaqs.answer: School students (Classes 6–12), college engineers, and product managers. When you book, you select your track so examples and pace match your background.

homeFaqs.question: Can I reschedule my session?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes. Use the link in your confirmation email to reschedule up to 24 hours before your session.

homeFaqs.question: Where is Verlin Labs based?
homeFaqs.answer: Verlin Labs is based in India and runs live online AI training for learners nationwide. Sessions are scheduled in India Standard Time (IST) by default, with options for compatible regions when you mention your time zone at booking.

homeFaqs.question: What topics do your AI programs cover?
homeFaqs.answer: Programs cover mental models for LLMs and transformers, prompt engineering, responsible AI use, RAG basics, product discovery workflows, portfolio projects, and hands-on tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Lovable, and Replit - tailored to students, engineers, or product managers.

homeFaqs.question: Do you offer corporate AI training?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes. Verlin Labs runs corporate AI literacy workshops for teams in India - half-day sessions, multi-week enablement, and executive briefings. Visit the Corporate page or contact us for a tailored proposal.

homeFaqs.question: How much do paid programs cost?
homeFaqs.answer: Paid track pricing is shown on each course page in Indian Rupees (INR) and varies by program length and audience. The free 2-hour intro session has no cost and no credit card requirement.
